---
name: Feed request
about: Suggest a new RSS feed to add to GeeksPulse
title: '[FEED] '
labels: feed-request
assignees: ''
---

## Feed details

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Feed name** | e.g. CSS Tricks |
| **Feed URL** | e.g. https://css-tricks.com/feed/ |
| **Category** | General / Security / AI / Python / JavaScript / Java / DevOps / Open Source / Rust / Go / Architecture |
| **Homepage** | e.g. https://css-tricks.com |

## Why should this feed be added?
Briefly explain why this source adds value to GeeksPulse (quality, relevance, signal-to-noise ratio).

## Checklist
- [ ] The feed is publicly accessible without authentication
- [ ] The feed publishes technical / developer-focused content
- [ ] The feed is not behind a paywall
- [ ] I've verified the RSS/Atom URL works (e.g. opened it in a browser)
